_meta.description: Keegan's dream companies — reverse-engineered preference system

companies.name: PostHog
companies.why_i_love_this: Job descriptions are the coolest I've ever seen. Love their mentality, mission, and how they approach everything. Transparent, weird in the best way, product-led.
companies.notes: Probably THE dream. Study how they write job descriptions — that's a signal for culture fit.

companies.name: Vercel
companies.why_i_love_this: Developer-first, incredible design, product I actually use and love. Infrastructure that feels like magic.

companies.name: Teenage Engineering
companies.why_i_love_this: Design and aesthetic mastery. Physical products that feel like art. Cross-section of hardware + music + obsessive craft.
companies.notes: Long-shot for GTM role, but cultural alignment is 10/10. Networking play.

companies.name: Avid (Pro Tools)
companies.why_i_love_this: Pro Tools is the industry standard for audio. Music creation tooling is my passion zone.

companies.name: Moog Music
companies.why_i_love_this: Synthesizers are art. Legendary brand with deep craft in hardware + sound design.

companies.name: Suno
companies.why_i_love_this: AI music generation — the cutting edge of what I care about (AI + music).
companies.notes: Category: music generation/creation — user said 'any sort of music generation or creation'

companies.name: Udio
companies.why_i_love_this: AI music generation platform — same category as Suno, cutting edge.

companies.name: Ableton
companies.why_i_love_this: Music creation software leader. Live is iconic. Culture of music + tech done right.

companies.name: Splice
companies.why_i_love_this: Music creation + collaboration platform. Bridging creators with modern tooling.
